buggy_variants.description: Expires boundary timestamp too early by using <= cutoff.
Allows zero or negative hit values instead of rejecting negatives only partially.
Treats provided total(ts) as exclusive by advancing to ts-1.
Rejects same-timestamp hits by requiring strictly increasing timestamps.
Does not update latest timestamp on total(ts), so expiry lags after queries.
Ignores zero-value hits and fails to advance time on them.
Counts only latest bucket when multiple hits share a timestamp.
